title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
